mapper.select: SELECT * FROM DOCS_MENU ORDER BY MENU_CD

SELECT count(*) FROM DOCS_MENU menu JOIN DOCS_REL_ROLE_GROUP roleGroup ON menu.ROLE_CD = roleGroup.ROLE_CD WHERE menu.USE_YN = 'Y' AND menu.DEL_YN = 'N' AND roleGroup.GROUP_CD = #{roleGroup} AND MENU_URL = #{url}

SELECT menu.MENU_CD AS menuCd, menu.PARENT_MENU_CD AS parentMenuCd, COALESCE(lang.LANG_DESC, menu.MENU_NM) AS menuNm, menu.MESSAGE_CD AS messageCd, menu.MENU_LEVEL AS menuLevel, menu.MENU_TYPE AS menuType, menu.MENU_URL AS menuUrl, menu.SORT_SEQ AS sortSeq, menu.TREE_TYPE AS treeType, menu.DEL_YN AS delYn, menu.USE_YN AS useYn, menu.TOOLTIP AS tooltip, menu.MENU_DESC AS menuDesc, menu.ROLE_CD AS roleCd, menu.MENU_ICON AS menuIcon FROM DOCS_MENU menu JOIN DOCS_REL_ROLE_GROUP role ON menu.ROLE_CD = role.ROLE_CD LEFT JOIN DOCS_LANG lang ON lang.LANG_CD = menu.MESSAGE_CD AND lang.LANG_TYPE = #{sessionLang} WHERE menu.TREE_TYPE = 'root' AND menu.MENU_TYPE != 'H' AND menu.AUTH_SITE IN (#{url_type}, 'B') AND role.GROUP_CD = #{roleGroup} AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_SEQ

WITH RECURSIVE parent (MENU_CD, PARENT_MENU_CD, MENU_NM, MESSAGE_CD, MENU_LEVEL, MENU_TYPE, MENU_URL, SORT_SEQ, TREE_TYPE, DEL_YN, USE_YN, TOOLTIP, MENU_DESC, ROLE_CD, MENU_PATH_CD, MENU_PATH, MAIN_CD) AS ( SELECT menu.MENU_CD, menu.PARENT_MENU_CD, COALESCE(lang.LANG_DESC, menu.MENU_NM) AS MENU_NM, menu.MESSAGE_CD, 1 AS MENU_LEVEL, menu.MENU_TYPE, menu.MENU_URL, menu.SORT_SEQ, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_MENU T WHERE T.PARENT_MENU_CD = menu.MENU_CD AND T.MENU_TYPE = 'M') > 0 THEN 'branch' ELSE 'leaf' END TREE_TYPE, menu.DEL_YN, menu.USE_YN, menu.TOOLTIP, menu.MENU_DESC, menu.ROLE_CD, CAST(menu.MENU_CD AS VARCHAR) AS MENU_PATH_CD, CAST(COALESCE(lang.LANG_DESC, menu.MENU_NM) AS VARCHAR) AS MENU_PATH, menu.MENU_CD AS MAIN_CD FROM DOCS_MENU menu JOIN DOCS_REL_ROLE_GROUP roleGroup ON menu.ROLE_CD = roleGroup.ROLE_CD LEFT JOIN DOCS_LANG lang ON lang.LANG_CD = menu.MESSAGE_CD AND lang.LANG_TYPE = #{sessionLang} WHERE AUTH_SITE IN (#{url_type}, 'B') AND MENU.TREE_TYPE = 'root' AND MENU.USE_YN = 'Y' AND MENU.DEL_YN = 'N' AND roleGroup.GROUP_CD = #{roleGroup} UNION ALL SELECT menu.MENU_CD, menu.PARENT_MENU_CD, COALESCE(lang.LANG_DESC, menu.MENU_NM) AS MENU_NM, menu.MESSAGE_CD, parent.MENU_LEVEL + 1 AS MENU_LEVEL, menu.MENU_TYPE, menu.MENU_URL, menu.SORT_SEQ, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DOCS_MENU T WHERE T.PARENT_MENU_CD = menu.MENU_CD AND T.MENU_TYPE = 'M') > 0 THEN 'branch' ELSE 'leaf' END TREE_TYPE, menu.DEL_YN, menu.USE_YN, menu.TOOLTIP, menu.MENU_DESC, menu.ROLE_CD, parent.MENU_PATH_CD || ' > ' || MENU.MENU_CD AS MENU_PATH_CD, parent.MENU_PATH || ' > ' || COALESCE(lang.LANG_DESC, menu.MENU_NM) AS MENU_PATH, parent.MAIN_CD AS MAIN_CD FROM DOCS_MENU menu JOIN parent ON menu.PARENT_MENU_CD = parent.MENU_CD JOIN DOCS_REL_ROLE_GROUP roleGroup ON menu.ROLE_CD = roleGroup.ROLE_CD LEFT JOIN DOCS_LANG lang ON lang.LANG_CD = menu.MESSAGE_CD AND lang.LANG_TYPE = #{sessionLang} WHERE menu.USE_YN = 'Y' AND menu.DEL_YN = 'N' AND roleGroup.GROUP_CD = #{roleGroup} ) SELECT * FROM parent T ORDER BY SORT_SEQ

WITH RECURSIVE PARENT (MENU_CD, PARENT_MENU_CD, MENU_NM, MENU_URL, MENU_LEVEL, MENU_TYPE, MAIN_CODE) AS ( SELECT MENU_CD, PARENT_MENU_CD, MENU_NM AS MENU_NM, MENU_URL AS MENU_URL, 1 AS MENU_LEVEL, MENU_TYPE, MENU_CD AS MAIN_CODE FROM DOCS_MENU WHERE PARENT_MENU_CD IN ('I', 'B', 'O') UNION ALL SELECT MENU.MENU_CD, MENU.PARENT_MENU_CD, PARENT.MENU_NM || ' > ' || MENU.MENU_NM AS MENU_NM, MENU.MENU_URL, PARENT.MENU_LEVEL + 1 AS MENU_LEVEL, MENU.MENU_TYPE, PARENT.MAIN_CODE AS MAIN_CODE FROM DOCS_MENU MENU JOIN PARENT ON MENU.PARENT_MENU_CD = PARENT.MENU_CD ) SELECT MENU_CD AS id, MENU_NM AS text FROM PARENT T WHERE MENU_NM LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{value}) || '%' ORDER BY MAIN_CODE, MENU_CD
SELECT * FROM DOCS_MENU WHERE MENU_CD = #{parentMenuCd} UNION ALL SELECT * FROM DOCS_MENU WHERE PARENT_MENU_CD = #{parentMenuCd} AND MENU_TYPE IN ('R', 'D', 'E')
SELECT MENU_NM FROM DOCS_MENU WHERE MENU_URL = #{value} LIMIT 1

SELECT 'MENU_000' AS id, CASE WHEN #{auth} = 'I' THEN '내부메뉴' WHEN #{auth} = 'E' THEN '외부메뉴' END AS text, '#' AS parent, '0' AS "level", 0 AS sort, 'R' AS type, 'Y' AS useYn, '' AS roleCd UNION ALL SELECT MENU_CD AS id, MENU_NM AS text, CASE PARENT_MENU_CD WHEN 'I' THEN 'MENU_000' WHEN 'E' THEN 'MENU_000' WHEN 'B' THEN 'MENU_000' ELSE PARENT_MENU_CD END AS parent, MENU_LEVEL AS "level", SORT_SEQ AS sort, MENU_TYPE AS type, USE_YN AS useYn, ROLE_CD AS roleCd FROM DOCS_MENU WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
AND MENU_TYPE IN ('T', 'M', 'P') AND AUTH_SITE IN ('I', 'B')
AND MENU_TYPE IN ('T', 'M', 'P') AND AUTH_SITE IN ('E', 'B')
ORDER BY sort
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_MENU SET MENU_NM = #{menuNm}, MENU_URL = #{menuUrl}, AUTH_SITE = #{authSite}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MENU_TYPE = #{menuType}, MENU_ICON = #{menuIcon} WHERE MENU_CD = #{menuCd}
mapper.select: SELECT MENU_CD AS menuCd, MENU_NM AS menuNm, PARENT_MENU_CD AS parentMenuCd, (SELECT MENU_NM FROM DOCS_MENU t WHERE t.MENU_CD = menu.PARENT_MENU_CD) AS parentMenuNm, CASE MENU_TYPE WHEN 'P' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS popupYn, MENU_URL AS menuUrl, USE_YN AS useYn, AUTH_SITE AS authSite, MENU_LEVEL AS menuLevel, MENU_ICON AS menuIcon FROM DOCS_MENU menu WHERE MENU_CD = #{menuCd} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
